core_mechanism: reversible storage-and-retrieval mapping of a multi-channel signal onto the collective internal degrees of freedom of a large ensemble of many elements, with total capacity scaling linearly in the number of independent parallel channels (spatial multiplexing across many modes of a distributed medium)
brief_reason: The abstract's whole scheme rests on a many-element (multi-atom) ensemble simultaneously storing many independent spatial modes so that, via 'optical parallelism', information capacity scales with the number of modes and exceeds a single-mode scheme.
